environment_prompt: Inside a space station corridor in zero gravity. Control panels with blinking lights lining the walls. A large circular hatch at the end of the corridor. Earth visible through a porthole window on the right. Cables, pipes, and handrails running along the ceiling. Metallic interior with warm artificial lighting. Behind the viewer, another sealed hatch leads to the crew quarters module. A floating clipboard and a tethered pen drift near the wall. Equipment storage lockers with labeled compartments line the corridor walls further back.
perspective_prompt: First-person perspective, floating view looking forward down the cylindrical space station corridor.

interactions.prompt: The view switches from first-person to third-person, pulling back to reveal an astronaut in a white EVA suit with a blue mission patch on the left arm and a tethered helmet from behind.
The view switches back to first-person, returning to the character's own eyes.
